clusters.example_sql:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fts_t1 USING fts5(c2);
EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN SELECT t1.*, p.* FROM q AS a WHERE CAST(NOT CURRENT_TIME OR NULL NOTNULL AS INT) GROUP BY CASE RAISE(IGNORE) ->> TRUE IS NO

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS p(c1 REAL NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO p VALUES (TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TRUE || TR
